'''Ringneldia II''', also known simply as '''Ringneldia''', was an [[Factory world/Legends|industrial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Ringneldia II was the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality's]] manufacturing center, using a unique and local measurement system based around the diameter of the [[Rigneldian bean|Ringneldian bean]].<ref name="ACGttC" /> This made Ringneldia's products totally incompatible with products using the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] standard of measurements.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ringneldia was misspelled Rigneldia in [[Star Wars Gamer 5|''Star Wars Gamer'' 5]].<ref name="ACGttC" /> ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' confirmed the correct spelling.<ref name="TEA" />
